Action: Business Issuer creates credential offer; Wallet collects offer and requests initial token using DPoP proof
Data:
- Credential offer deeplink
- DPoP proof with key1 thumbprint
- Token endpoint
Expected Result: Wallet obtains access token bound to key1

Action: Wallet requests credential using DPoP proof with different key (key2 with different thumbprint)
Data:
- Access token (bound to key1)
- DPoP proof with key2 thumbprint (mismatch)
- Credential request
Expected Result: Issuer returns HTTP 400; DPoP binding mismatch is detected and rejected
